Dros..personality: The Drosera constitution is a restless, anxious, and suspicious individual who dreads being alone yet distrusts even close friends. They are prone to feelings of persecution and haunted by nocturnal fears, particularly of ghosts, reflecting a deeply insecure and vigilant temperament.
Dros..mental_state: The mind is marked by confusion, persistent suspicion, and a fixed sense of being persecuted. Sleeplessness and nocturnal anxiety dominate, with dread intensifying after midnight, producing a state of exhausted yet agitated wakefulness.
Dros..emotional_pattern: Fear is the central emotional theme—fear of the dark, of solitude, and of betrayal by trusted companions. There is a deep-seated vulnerability expressed through clinging dependence combined with paranoid withdrawal, creating an isolating cycle of needing others yet being unable to trust them.
